programme.title: Lost Resort: Welcome to the Lost Resort

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Rock-a-Bye-Baby

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: My City

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Breaking Brig

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: It Happened Last Night

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Master of Horror
programme.desc: With New Orleans decorated for Halloween, the team investigates the murder of a naval staff Judge Advocate found in a cemetery dressed in a Victorian costume with vampiric puncture wounds on her neck. Meanwhile, the team debates Halloween night activity.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Watch Over Me

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Love Hurts
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a petty officer found in a Mardi Gras float storage facility with an engagement ring and proposal plan in hand. However, the case takes a mysterious turn when the team is unable to locate his supposed girlfriend.

programme.desc: Wanted for multiple sex attacks against women in Northern California over three decades, this masked predator meticulously planned his assaults by studying the habits and routines of his female prey. After 27 years investigators finally close in.

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret
programme.desc: This is the shocking and gruesome mystery of John Wayne Gacy, a popular Chicago businessman and part-time clown who was leading a double life in the 1970s. By day he was a community leader and by night a predator of young men.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: The Murder Capital Of The World (Part 1)
programme.desc: A frantic public, desperate for answers, live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed 'The Co-Ed Killer' to strike again. But no one could have expected that the person responsible, a local man, Edmund Kemper, was living among them.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)
programme.desc: In April 1973, 24-year-old Edmund Kemper had murdered six coeds in and around the city of Santa Cruz, California, shaking the community to its core.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Robert Durst: World's Worst Fugitive (Part 1)
programme.desc: The unbelievable story of Robert Durst, the millionaire heir to a vast real estate fortune who has been linked to the deaths of his wife, his best friend, and his neighbor.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Robert Durst: Nobody Tells the Whole Truth (Part 2)
programme.desc: Six weeks after jumping bail in Galveston, Texas, Robert Durst is caught on a store security camera in Pennsylvania shoplifting a sandwich and is quickly sent back to Galveston to stand trial for the murder of his neighbor, Morris Black.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dinner and a Movie
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her home while her husband is on a sailing trip. When investigating, police uncover a lifestyle of sex parties and wife swapping.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)
programme.desc: In April 1973, 24-year-old Edmund Kemper had murdered six coeds in and around the city of Santa Cruz, California, shaking the community to its core.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: The Duke of Death
programme.desc: He is among the most infamous serial killers in American history. From 1976 to 1977, David Berkowitz terrorized New York City under his creepy self-given moniker: the Son of Sam.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: I Am A Monster
programme.desc: In 1977, the city of New York was being stalked by a seemingly faceless serial killer known as, 'Son of Sam.' But after his final shooting took him to Brooklyn, a twist of fate and a little luck led to his capture.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: Summer Of Terror (Part 1)
programme.desc: The summer of 1985 was one of the hottest Los Angeles had seen in a century. But terrified residents weren't sleeping with the windows open, they weren't sleeping at all. A killer was on the loose. He was the Night Stalker.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: I WIll Be Avenged (Part 2)
programme.desc: A tip from a teenage boy leads to the identity of the Night Stalker. Twenty-four hours later a mob of angry citizens track him down and capture him.

programme.title: Adam Devine's Secret Shark Lair
programme.desc: Adam DeVine and a team experts find what could be the world's largest gathering of tiger sharks.

programme.title: ShaqAttack: Sharkmania
programme.desc: With Sharkmania facts and bonus scenes: Shaq returns to decide which shark has the perfect attack. Together with his friends Dude Perfect and Mark Rober, Shaq puts a number of sharks to the test to learn their most mind-blowing hunting techniques.

programme.title: Sharkadelic Summer: Sharkmania
programme.desc: With Sharkmania facts and bonus scenes: Snoop Dogg revisits crazy shark encounters, marvels at unpredictable reactions and meets with the pros to unlock the secrets behind mysterious great white behavior.

programme.title: Sharks of Ghost Island
programme.desc: Locals abandoned Ghost Island after multiple shipwrecks and shark attacks. Now, Dr. Craig O'Connell and his team of experts dive in to find out why the island at the edge of the Bermuda Triangle attracts so many sharks, including the Great White.

programme.title: Wicked Sharks
programme.desc: Greg Skomal investigates great white shark encounters on Cape Cod using cutting-edge technology to capture how and where they hunt to better protect the public.

programme.title: Sharks Gone Wild 3
programme.desc: A look at viral videos, news stories, and cutting-edge science on sharks.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Terrors From the Deep
programme.desc: A Californian surfer, a Canadian thrill-seeker, an Alabama football coach, and a North Carolina mother share how they came face-to-face with sharks and survived.

programme.title: Shark Bait
programme.desc: Great whites have learned new ways to hunt seals on Cape Cod. Dr. Greg Skomal and his team wonder what the sharks are doing here, how they get here, and how more sharks learn of Cape Cod's bounty of seals.

programme.title: The Killing Games
programme.desc: Dr. Jonathan Werry and shark cinematographer Andy Casagrande travel to a special location in South Australia to research a new great white hunting strategy.

programme.title: Sharks of Ghost Island
programme.desc: Locals abandoned Ghost Island after multiple shipwrecks and shark attacks. Now, Dr. Craig O'Connell and his team of experts dive in to find out why the island at the edge of the Bermuda Triangle attracts so many sharks, including the Great White.

programme.title: Shark Trip: Eat Prey Chum
programme.desc: Explorer Rob Riggle brings his friends Adam DeVine, Anthony Anderson, Joel McHale, and Damon Wayans Jr. on a getaway that's actually a shark diving mission to locate the Caribbean's largest tiger shark.

programme.title: Adam Devine's Secret Shark Lair
programme.desc: Adam DeVine and a team experts find what could be the world's largest gathering of tiger sharks.

programme.title: Lair of the Great White
programme.desc: Experts investigate why a group of great whites of the coast of Western Australia is more aggressive than others.

programme.title: Tiger Shark King
programme.desc: Dr. Austin Gallagher investigates camera footage of a 14-foot tiger shark being attacked by an unseen beast.

programme.title: Mako Nation
programme.desc: Shark expert Riley Elliot and underwater cameraman Andy Casagrande are on an epic expedition to uncover the mysteries of the mako shark in one of the last places on earth where these apex predators rule the waters.

programme.title: Abandoned Waters
programme.desc: Lack of human activity on the water caused by the global lockdown has led the largest great whites in South Australia to return to their natural behaviors. Shark experts can now study them up close and personal in ways that were nearly impossible before.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Land of the Lost Sharks
programme.desc: Wildlife biologist and conservationist Forrest Galante dives into some of the most treacherous, shark-infested waters in the southern hemisphere all in an attempt to rediscover three unique sharks lost to science for as long as 100 years.

programme.title: Great White Serial Killer Extinction
programme.desc: The Great White Serial Killer returns and it's on a killing spree that may push the California Sea Otter to extinction. Investigators deploy an otter dummy to get a closer look and witness one of the most spectacular attacks in Shark Week history.

programme.title: Air Jaws: Ultimate Breach Off
programme.desc: Three teams of researchers return to one of the last hunting grounds for Air Jaws. They will use decoys, drones and underwater cameras to count the number of breaches and collect data on hunting techniques to see if the shark population is rebounding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Showing Off Your Assets

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Brides and Their Boys
programme.desc: Dana is shopping with her two bridesmen for an edgy wedding dress. Akisha brings her fiancé's best man to her appointment to represent her husband's opinion.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Better Than the First

programme.desc: Monica sings at a karaoke bar and is very exposed; Rachel and Gavin kiss.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Blind Dates
programme.desc: In the hope of reuniting Ross and Rachel, Joey and Phoebe set them up on bad blind dates.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Mugging
programme.desc: Joey stumbles upon an unusual method of acting in order to impress a famous fellow actor.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Boob Job
programme.desc: When Monica and Chandler are financially strapped, Monica secretly asks Joey for a loan.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Memorial Service
programme.desc: Ross and Chandler trade blows at each other's reputation over the Internet.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Lottery
programme.desc: Monica and the gang purchase dozens of lottery tickets for the power ball jackpot.

programme.title: Mom: Quaaludes and Crackerjack
programme.desc: In order to avoid her ex-boyfriend, Bonnie drags Christy to a new AA meeting, only to run into her ex-girlfriend, Jeanine, from 30 years ago.

programme.title: Mom: Cinderella and a Drunk MacGyver
programme.desc: Christy tries to help Julian, a handsome, newly sober AA member but her attraction to him complicates things. Meanwhile, Bonnie jumps at the chance to attend a lavish charity gala with Jill.

programme.title: Mom: Diabetic Lesbians and a Blushing Bride
programme.desc: When Marjorie announces she's getting married, Christy and Bonnie are determined to make it the perfect day.

programme.title: Mom: Sticky Hands and a Walk on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Christy, Jill and Wendy find themselves in a sticky situation when they agree to help Bonnie smuggle an illegal substance across the Canadian border.

programme.title: George Lopez: George to the Third Power
programme.desc: George is unhappy with the family's less than compassionate and unfriendly dentist.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Gets Assisterance
programme.desc: George reaches out to his long lost sister in order to get educational assistance for Max.

programme.title: Full House: Cutting It Close
programme.desc: Jesse lets his hair down literally when he lets Stephanie give him a 'pretend' haircut.

programme.title: Full House: Tanner vs. Gibbler
programme.desc: Danny gets a new job as host of a morning talk show; D.J. throws a party for her friend.

programme.title: Full House: It's Not My Job
programme.desc: Jesse upsets his father's plan when he decides that he wants out of the family business.

programme.title: Full House: D.J.'s Very First Horse
programme.desc: The Tanners are in for a wild ride when D.J. gets a horse but must hide it from her dad.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Two Faces of Squidward/ Spongehenge
programme.desc: SpongeBob slams the door in Squidward's face; Squidward gets surgery and becomes handsome.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Yours, Mine and Mine/ Kracked Krabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick buy a toy and have to learn to share it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Inmates of Summer/ To Save a Squirrel
programme.desc: Instead of getting on the ship headed for summer camp, SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally board a ship full of prisoners on their way to jail on Inferno Island.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Barnacle Face/ Pet Sitter Pat
programme.desc: The night before the big school dance, Mr. Krabs asks SpongeBob to help Pearl get rid of a barnacle on her face.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: The Blame Game
programme.desc: Steel learns the concept of discipline and takes it too far, putting one of the Rangers in real danger.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spy Buddies/ Boat Smarts/ Good 'Ol What's-His-Name
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick spy on Plankton; SpongeBob makes an instructional boating video.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Midden Fleasure/ Tread or Alive
programme.desc: Fendrich and his gang learn of Cluster's hidden junkyard treasure. Harl Cluster, Shirley and Tread unite to protect it. Snake and Daisy take advantage of Tread to get him to act as their getaway driver to pull off a heist.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Giant Squidward/ No Nose Knows
programme.desc: When Squidward gets spritzed with plant growth spray, he becomes monstrously huge. Patrick gets a nose.

programme.title: Movie: Ice Age: Continental Drift
programme.desc: Three friends go on an adventure after their continent floats away. Using an iceberg as a boat, they face many challenges as they discover a new land they have never seen before.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wormy/ Patty Hype
programme.desc: The gang thinks that Sandy's pet caterpillar has been consumed by a 'monster' butterfly; Bob markets his coloured crabcakes to the Krusty Krab's clientele.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Club SpongeBob/ My Pretty Seahorse
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build a small clubhouse and tell Squid he can't join. Spongebob finds a stray sea horse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Procrastination/ I'm With Stupid
programme.desc: Bob is easily distracted from an essay; Bob and Pat attempt to prove who's smarter.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubbletown/Girls’ Night Out
programme.desc: SpongeBob visits his old pal Bubble Buddy's hometown Bubbletown. Sandy invites Karen and Mrs. Puff out for a night on the town, so the ladies decide to blow off some steam.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Boating Buddies/ Krabby Kronicle
programme.desc: Squidward is forced to attend Boating School with SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pet or Pests/ Komputer Overload
programme.desc: SpongeBob adopts a stray worm, which soon gives birth to a litter of baby worms.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sweet and Sour Squidward/ The Googly Artiste
programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the Krabby Patty formula. When an art critic deems Patrick a true artiste for his rocks-with-googly-eyes creations, everyone in Bikini Bottom clamours for a Patrick original.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton's Old Chum/ Stormy Weather
programme.desc: The place that Plankton usually dumps his rotten chum is too full, so he tricks SpongeBob into hiding it around the city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Cave Dwelling Sponge/ The Clam Whisperer
programme.desc: When a prehistoric Sponge is unfrozen, he causes chaos all over town, and only SpongeBob can communicate with him. A flock of clams descend on Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whirlybrains/ MermaidPants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get hooked on the latest fad of flying your own brain like a tiny drone. When SpongeBob and Patrick play Mermaidman and Barnacleboy, it's all fun and games until their sworn enemies arrive.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Very Buffalo Christmas
programme.desc: It's chaos at Buffalo when the Christmas toy run to the Arctic is plagued by breakdowns and the stress pushes Kelly past her breaking point.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Killer Sea Foam
programme.desc: Killer sea foam, a lake that disappears and reappears, air filled with diamond dust and a snowfall in a Middle Eastern desert are all explained.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Worldwide Weather Wipeouts
programme.desc: Lakes are boiled and frogs frozen alive. Plagues of locusts rain down and snow buries a city. Explore global weather wipeouts from Maryland to the Middle East.

programme.title: Weird Earth: Mist Domes and Square Waves
programme.desc: A weird white dome appears over a valley famous for UFO sightings. Engineers try to work out why a huge bridge collapses on a clear blue day, was the weather secretly to blame?

programme.title: Weird Earth: Fire Worms and Green Clouds
programme.desc: What is the mysterious glowing green entity filmed in Australia's night time sky? Does footage of a twisting fire worm prove locals legends about a cave dwelling super serpent? And why is a bizarre face filmed glaring from the sky in Saudi Arabia?

programme.title: Mayday: Final Approach
programme.desc: On August 6, 1997, Korean Air Flight 801 crashed five kilometres short of its destination. Killing 200 people on board it began the crusade of one passenger determined to make air travel safer.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Strange Skies
programme.desc: In 24-hour period thunderstorms, multiple suns, rainbows and night mirages change the Earth's sky.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: It Fell From Space
programme.desc: Exposing the secrets behind asteroids, comets and space debris that fall to Earth from space. Investigating the latest technologies that detect space objects before coming to Earth and the spacecraft designed to stop them.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Sinkholes
programme.desc: Sinkholes generate below the surface of the earth and will swallow anything above the surface. In North America, there are hundreds of thousands of sinkholes alone.

programme.title: Tornado Alley: Big City Twister: Miami
programme.desc: Explore what might happen if an EF-5 touched down in Miami Beach, Florida. Built to withstand hurricanes, this vacation paradise could be literally torn apart by the force of such a strong twister, which, unlike a hurricane, gives no notice.

programme.title: Tornado Alley: Real Time Moore
programme.desc: See the story of the Moore Tornado through firsthand accounts and videos.

programme.title: Tornado Alley: I Survived: Split Second
programme.desc: A shelter provides a welcome refuge from the storm until it becomes a trap. A grandmother who runs a daycare takes cover in a bathtub and saves herself and three toddlers. A neighbor feels guilt when he turns his back on a woman caught outside.

programme.title: FireStorm
programme.desc: All over the country, wildfires are getting bigger and the fire seasons are lasting longer. The changing climate and record heat are taking a toll. We take you into the fire storm with the men and women who sacrifice their lives to save yours.

programme.title: Hoarders: Andrew/ Lydia
programme.desc: Stuck in a hoarded house, with no job, no motivation and no direction, Andrew needs to control his hoarding to have a normal life. Lydia's son may be sent to a nursing home if she doesn't clean her house.

programme.title: Hoarders: Mary and Mary Ann
programme.desc: Mary has overstuffed her home and consignment shop, spending over $200,000; Mary Ann's husband threatens divorce.

programme.title: Hoarders: Glen/ Lisa
programme.desc: Twenty-five-hundred free-roaming rats have hoarded Glen out of his home and into a shed on his property. More than 30 cats roam freely through Lisa's cluttered home and she is threatened with eviction.

programme.title: Hoarders: Ron/ Carol
programme.desc: Ron's home is filled from top to bottom with paper--books, old newspapers and more. Carol has been sleeping in a hoarded truck parked in front of her condemned hoarded house.

programme.title: Hoarders: Sandy and Len
programme.desc: Len lives in a home stuffed full of garbage bags where he keeps all his belongings. If he doesn't clean up, his family fears his house will kill him.

programme.title: Hoarders: Kathy and Elmira
programme.desc: Kathy has hoarded out her triplex and a dance studio and is facing financial ruin if she can't clean up and rent out her spaces.

programme.title: Hoarders: Peggy and Ed and Connie
programme.desc: Peggy's hoard of filth and dead animal carcasses has led the city to deem her house uninhabitable. If she does not clean up, city officials will not allow Peggy to return to her beloved home.

programme.title: The First 48: Gun Fight/ The Ring
programme.desc: In Kansas City, Mo., a man is shot dead during a gun fight. Detectives work the brutal stabbing of a young mother killed in her own bedroom.

programme.title: The First 48: Burning Rage/ Fallen Soldiers
programme.desc: A Birmingham detective investigates the murder of three family members, including a young girl, who were stabbed to death in their home and then burned.

programme.title: The First 48: Lying in Wait/ With This Ring
programme.desc: In Atlanta two men are ambushed at gunpoint and only one survives to tell the tale. Also, A mother is found stabbed to death on the side of the road, but a wedding ring dropped at the scene could break the case.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Firefighter's Ball (Part One)
programme.desc: Terry learns some new dance moves to impress Vicky at the fireman's ball, while Lucy discovers that her date is more like his mother than she realized. Plus, Eddie finds out he is up for a big promotion.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Talkoma: Firefighter's Ball (Part One)
programme.desc: Kevin Heffernan and Steve Lemme take viewers behind the scenes of Tacoma FD.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Just Say No
programme.desc: Find out which joker loves blackjack, what baseball team two of the guys split season tickets for and how they found the lovely lady whose heart Q broke during his ball field punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Firefighter's Ball (Part One)
programme.desc: Terry learns some new dance moves to impress Vicky at the fireman's ball, while Lucy discovers that her date is more like his mother than she realized. Plus, Eddie finds out he is up for a big promotion.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 5
programme.desc: The guys dine and discuss their week. Find out who can make the best meal and how long Q's beard has become.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 6
programme.desc: The guys put their culinary skills to the test by serving dishes the viewers requested. Plus, find out if Joe grew a mustache.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Firefighter's Ball (Part One)
programme.desc: Terry learns some new dance moves to impress Vicky at the fireman's ball, while Lucy discovers that her date is more like his mother than she realized. Plus, Eddie finds out he is up for a big promotion.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 13
programme.desc: Counting down 20 of the dumbest performers you've ever seen including a woman dancing in butter and team mascots gone wild.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 15
programme.desc: Featuring twenty of the most talent less performers yet. Performances include a man in a toast topping to a death scene that takes too long to die.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 16
programme.desc: Twenty of the most pinheaded performers ever to take the stage. From lion trainers under attack, to a sexy drum solo, and a guy famous for smoking weed.

programme.title: Lost Resort: Welcome to the Lost Resort
programme.desc: Eight wounded souls check in to embark on a journey of healing to overcome trauma.

programme.title: Lost Resort: Unmasked Meltdowns
programme.desc: When Robin and Christine's fighting annoys the rest of the group, Meco and Claudia give them a piece of their mind. An unlikely friendship forms when the group gets vulnerable. A romance among the guests gets steamy.

programme.title: Lost Resort: Turn Up the Heat
programme.desc: Channelling ancestors turns out to be conflicting for guests and healer Ataseia. The Sexual Energy Healer threatens a burgeoning romance.

programme.title: Lost Resort: Orgasmic Healing Anyone?
programme.desc: Meco ends up in a threesome with Acqua and Vairrun during Orgasmic Healing, while the mother-daughter drama continues.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Welcome to Miami
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover who considered taking a quick thumbs down. Plus, find out what type of vacation Murr prefers, and how many attempts it took to film the punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.desc: A hostile takeover of the Montecito casino is thwarted by a stunning change of events. Mike is mugged by a thug, leaving Danny to seek revenge. Meanwhile, Delinda is smitten by a blind man who keeps his real life a secret from her.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Down and Dirty
programme.desc: When a televised national poker tour comes to the Montecito, Danny and Mike investigate their hunch that someone is cheating. Elsewhere, Sam battles with Casey over their divorce settlement, and demands half ownership of the casino.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Bait and Switch
programme.desc: When diamonds are stolen from the Montecito pool taping of a Fat Joe music video, Danny and Ed rely on amateur sex video footage to track down the thief. Elsewhere, Sam and Mary set out to reveal Mike's secret as a male stripper named Hot Chocolate.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Bitch Is Back
programme.desc: The Montecito prepares for the opening of Wolfgang Puck's seventh Vegas restaurant. Elsewhere, hotel guests become frightened when they begin to have ghostly encounters. Sam wagers a bet with her nemesis to see who is the best host in Vegas.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Truth or Chair
programme.desc: Todd moves his mother to Nashville, but her belongings take over his pristine home. Meanwhile, Chase insists that his dad take a lie detector test after he catches wind of his father's penchant for lying.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rent Controlled
programme.desc: Todd offers to help Savannah purchase a home, but there are strings attached. Meanwhile, Grayson's monthly phone bill gets him in hot water with Todd.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The House That Todd Built
programme.desc: Todd signs the family up with a local charity in order to teach the kids about giving back to the community. Grayson's school project causes a rift between Todd and Faye over their heritage.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: 50 Shades of Faye
programme.desc: Nanny Faye joins the world of online dating. When Todd gets wind of it, he makes himself her chaperone. Meanwhile, new homeowners Chase and Savannah compete for Todd's handouts to furnish their homes.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Client-Hell
programme.desc: Savannah agrees to manage Todd's singing career for a school project and unwittingly unleashes his inner diva. Meanwhile, Chase struggles to throw a dinner for the family to prove he can outdo Savannah.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Bunions, Bulldogs and Hedgehogs, Oh My!
programme.desc: Todd thinks taking over Julie's housework while she recovers from surgery will be a cakewalk, but running the home isn't as easy as it looks. Chase schemes with Nanny Faye to get Todd to accept his dog, Lilo.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Market Crash
programme.desc: Chase accepts Todd's Challenge to market the juice bar, but quickly realizes that selling juice is hard. Meanwhile, Todd and Julie fret about Savannah, who's convalescing at the family home after a bad car wreck.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Mannequin Challenge
programme.desc: Savannah struggles with a project for her clothing line. Chase gets an ultimatum from Todd about getting Lilo's behaviour under control.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: O Grayson, Where Art Thou?
programme.desc: Todd and Julie's plans for a peaceful weekend go awry. Chase tries to spend some bonding time with Grayson, but things don't go as planned.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Matchmakers and Batchbakers
programme.desc: Todd and Julie try to find Savannah the perfect match when she jumps back into the dating pool. Meanwhile, Grayson enters a baking contest.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG International All Stars
programme.desc: It's an international culinary showdown when four returning GGG chefs representing Latin, French, Italian and Korean cuisines battle it out to see who will take home the title. First, Guy Fieri gives them an item limit for making their hometown favorite.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: The Fieri Family Watch Party
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and family cozy up to take a look back at the first pilot episode. This cross-country drive down memory lane includes a nine-seat counter in New Jersey and a 1950s-style diner in Boston cranking out their own corned beef hash.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Smoke And Seafood
programme.desc: Guys visits a Baltimore barbecue food truck for pulled pork and ribs, and a shrimp shack in Islamorada.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Faces, New Places
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's visiting some familiar Triple D faces and checking out their new places including a primo pizza joint in Flagstaff, Arizona firing up pies with not-your-everyday toppings.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Crankin' Up the Classics
programme.desc: In Minneapolis, an Italian deli serves pizza and pasta. In Dallas, the menu includes gumbo and burgers with brisket.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Global Traditions
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's tasting all kinds of international comfort classics such as the authentic British fish 'n chips joint known for keeping it real.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Goin' International
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbin' gangster global grub. In Houston, a Jamaican joint knocking it out of the park with their oxtail and curry goat. Plus, a Lebanese stop serving up mom's specialties like kibbie balls and kabobs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Not What You'd Expect
programme.desc: Guy Fieri discovers outrageous food at some unlikely joints in Austin, Texas, Minneapolis and Albuquerque.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Rollin' in the Dough
programme.desc: Guy visits Mesa, Arizona for a legit Hawaiian joint serving island specialities including a meaty bun, and Tucson for a place serving up saucy sandwiches and spinach dip calzones.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Intrigue
programme.desc: Guy grabs some Thai noodles, curry and green papaya salad in Dallas. In Miami he visits a Lating place for empanadas and a unique plantain sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mega Meat and Sweet Treats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri dives into mega meat and a little bit of sweet. In Atlanta, a Korean-taqueria mashing up unique flavors in their chicken tacos and bulgogi fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Beef to Bao
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into dishes from beef to buns. In Logan, Utah, a joint servin' up worldwide flavor, like lomo saltado and a funky peanut butter burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Bold Bites Brought Home
programme.desc: Since the Fieri Family loves both cooking at home and great restaurant food, they're combining the best of both worlds with some Triple-D style takeout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From The Sea
programme.desc: Guy Fieri heads back to see what the Triple D Nation is cookin' up from under the sea. For starters, an oyster shuckin' shack is putting a new spin on an old favorite in the Big Easy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Flavortown Comes Home
programme.desc: With restaurant takeout and delivery taking over the nation, on this trip, Guy is hosting a virtual Triple-D family reunion, bringing 'Flavortown' to his own kitchen. Guy checks in with four DDD alumns who walk Guy through their signature recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Cross-Country Delivery
programme.desc: On the menu for Guy and his son today, there's a Wild West Virginia weenie, a new spin on a burger from Charlotte, N.C., a Miami Asian-barbecue mashup and a righteous baloney sandwich from Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real Deal BBQ
programme.desc: Guy seeks out authentic barbecue restaurants around the country.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Regional Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels from the east coast to the southwest in search of regional specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: The Memphis Barbecue Tour
programme.desc: While in Memphis, Guy samples pulled pork sandwiches and barbecue spaghetti.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Flavor
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hunts down some seriously good food with visits to Baltimore, Minnesota, and Mississippi.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Sophie's Sunday Funday
programme.desc: Bobby Flay and his daughter Sophie are huge sports fans. After video-chatting with each other about this football season, Bobby makes a brunch perfect for tailgating with apple crisp French toast casserole and an easy frittata sandwich.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cooking with Tyler Florence
programme.desc: Ina Garten demonstrates how to entertain with simplicity, style, and fun.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: The Bertinelli Boys Are Back in Town
programme.desc: Valerie is refreshing classic diner fare in a meal for her brothers, David and Patrick, and her nephew, Enzo.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16 Minute Meals: Italian
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes a trio of marvelous 16-minute Italian meals. There's speedy pork scaloppini for a fast family dinner and snappy, saucy steak pizzaiola that the boys absolutely adore.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ask Me Anything: All About Kids
programme.desc: Ree Drummond opens up in a fun Q and A about kids, with some of the questions coming from her pint-sized fans. Her answers include an 11-carton cake with a simple trick and vanilla buttercream frosting and a ranch pork chop sheet pan supper.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Drummond Kids at the Merc
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's filling the fridge with the kids' favorite foods while they're all helping out at the Merc. First, there's Paige's quiche with her pick of fillings. Then, a broccoli cheese mac and cheese mash-up as ordered by Bryce.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Us and Them
programme.desc: It's a tale of two dinners at the Drummond Ranch, one for the kids and one for adults.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Chinese Family Favorites
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making some of her favourite Chinese-inspired recipes, including some passed down from her dad's family. He's flying in with Molly's Aunt Lucy to visit her and baby Bernie, so Molly makes them her grandma's sweet and sour tepong pork.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Wolfie's Home!
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli celebrates her son Wolf's return after months of touring by making his favorite foods for him and his best friend. She creates a meal of pasta e fagioli, Thursday turkey meatloaf, and roasted broccoli rabe.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Retro Reboot
programme.desc: Guy Fieri brings some of his most creative chef friends to the ranch to revamp dishes that are best described as moldy oldies. Aarti Sequeira uses cardamom to give chicken a la king an Indian makeover. Justin Warner deconstructs and reinvents crab Louie.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Family-Style Fish Fry
programme.desc: Michael Symon's outdoor, family-friendly meal starts with a fish fry with lime aioli, where he fries fresh fluke in a pot over coals on the grill.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Summer Produce Relay
programme.desc: The Kitchen passes the summer produce and cooking easy, flavourful recipes. Katie Lee shares a grilled smoky tofu tacos with peach cucumber salad. She tosses a cucumber to Sunny, who makes easy mustard-pickled vegetables.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Rematch Mania
programme.desc: Three pairs of rival chefs who previously faced off one-on-one return. First, two budget brawlers settle the score in a round that has them shopping for ingredients under five dollars for their family dinners.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Battle America
programme.desc: Guy Fieri brings in chefs from the four corners of the U.S. to see which region has the tastiest food. He starts off the competition by asking the chefs to cook their best regional sandwich, but on a budget.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG Judges and Their Spouses
programme.desc: Three of GGG's most beloved judges bring their significant others to Flavortown for some friendly competition.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror

programme.desc: Chase and the crew have their work cut out for them turning a vacation cabin that was originally a 1920s horse barn into a stable building for a large family. The crew draw on the past as inspiration and want to honour the owners' late parents.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: An Uphill Battle
programme.desc: Lifelong Mainers bought their Belgrade cabin in 1987 and have maintained it over the years, but the list of needed repairs continues to grow. Chase and the team give the camp much-needed life by rebuilding its front wall and replacing the heating system.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ship-shape Shack
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full transforming a family's treasured 1950s lobster shack into a cabin that will create a lifetime of memories for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Stable Family Ties

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond

programme.title: Tiny House, Big Living: Family of Five's Tiny House

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Grandma's Cabin
programme.desc: Mark and the guys save the logs from a fire-damaged home in West Virginia. Mark promises the family who sold him the cabin that he will honor their history here. Once the logs are salvaged, the cabin is rebuilt on the Boneyard for a client in Montana.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Johnny Jett Special
programme.desc: Machinist, artist and craftsman Johnny Jett is honoured by The Barnwood Builders in this one-hour special. Johnny's most unforgettable moments are highlighted as well as previously unaired footage featuring West Virginia's favorite Renaissance man.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Digger's Cabin: The Whole Story
programme.desc: This one-hour special follows the whole story of how the Barnwood Builders transformed Digger's cabin into David's dream home, from a muddy take-down in West Virginia to a tricky build in Texas, and a remarkable finished result.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Coming Home
programme.desc: The builders save an incredible cabin with huge logs that was nearly lost to a fire in West Virginia. They transport it all the way to Montana for restoration, where Mark returns to see it fully finished inside and out.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Saving the Cabin That Saved the Company
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his crew work to salvage a cabin that saved their business. It takes a variety of repairs to bring it back to life, but once it's up, Katherine has the best surprise of all. Later, Mark's pal Eddie makes a lamp out of reclaimed materials.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Sweet Home Louisiana

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Major Makeover in Maryland

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Out of Date in the Outer Banks

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Paris: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern returns to the European epicenter of fashion, art and commerce. Paris is home to rich and masterful cuisine, and Andrew finds the best places to get everything from traditional pot au feu topped with with bone marrow to fresh steak tartare.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Louisville, Kentucky
programme.desc: Andrew explores Louisville icons like country ham, burgoo stew, and derby pie.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Las Vegas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern goes on a gastronomic tour of Las Vegas, NV. From quail breast stuffed with foie gras and mouth-watering Waygu steaks to classic veal Parmigiana and tantalizing Thai, Sin City has it all.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puerto Rico
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern checks out San Juan, Puerto Rico's comfort foods, and beach eats.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Miami
programme.desc: Miami's beaches and glitzy nightlife make it an international hot spot, but it's the food that really gives this city flavour. From Cuban sandwiches to fresh stone crabs and key lime pie, Andrew reveals Miami's iconic foods.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Buenos Aires
programme.desc: In Buenos Aires, a strong sense of tradition drives the food culture. Barbecued beef, chimichurri and sweet dulce de leche are featured as Andrew uncovers the mashup of mingling cultures that influence the city's cuisine.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charleston, SC
programme.desc: Casey heads to Charleston, SC, for some epic low country eats. He takes on the belt buster challenge where he must consume a two-pound burger, three pounds of nachos, a hulking order of tater tots and a 12-ounce milkshake in 20 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sleepy Hollow, NY
programme.desc: Casey visits spooky Sleepy Hollow, New York, where he tries the massive headless horseman burger and takes on the Dawg House challenge in which a roll of the dice chooses twelve insanely topped hot dogs that he must eat in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Duluth, MN
programme.desc: Casey heads to Duluth, Minnesota, where he tastes the city's best fish fry, visits a specialty sandwich shop and attempts to finish a three-pound platter of pie and ice cream in 20 minutes or less.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Palm Springs, CA
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary quest takes him back in time to Palm Springs, California, where he comes face-to-face with a three-pound skyscraper of a sandwich loaded with every deli meat imaginable.

programme.title: Melania Trump: A Very Beautiful First Lady

programme.title: Hidden White House
programme.desc: This special offers a rare look inside the grandest building in our nation's history. For the first time, Americans will get a glimpse behind those imposing walls as we reveal what life is really like for those who've lived in the White House.

programme.title: American Moses: The Charlton Heston Story
programme.desc: Moses to Michelangelo, civil rights leader to astronaut on Planet of the Apes, Charlton Heston was always more than a Hollywood star. With a career spanning 60 years & a hundred films, he was a cultural warrior & never backed down from controversy.

programme.title: Missions That Changed the War: Enola Gay: SuperFortress
programme.desc: Theodore 'Dutch' Van Kirk, the last remaining crew member of the B-29 Superfortress that delivered the atomic bomb to Hiroshima, gives a first-person account of the airplane, crew and target selection, as well as the training for the historic mission.

programme.title: Missions That Changed the War: Enola Gay: The Mission
programme.desc: Theodore "Dutch" Van Kirk, the navigator of the Enola Gay, the B-29 that dropped the first atomic bomb used as a weapon of war on Hiroshima, Japan, offers his first-person account of historic mission, flown on August 6, 1945.

programme.title: Marines in Combat: Iwo Jima
programme.desc: A volcanic island had to be taken in 1945 for its airfields. There were 26000 American casualties, and 21000 Japanese.

programme.title: Marines in Combat: Okinawa
programme.desc: The Marines landed April 1, 1945. It took 300000 troops and 82 days to take the island.

programme.title: Marines in Combat: Korea 1950-1952, Pt.1 Landing at Pusan

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Guess Who's Shopping for Dinner/ New Roomie
programme.desc: Abuela teaches Ronnie Anne that getting ingredients for dinner is no small task. When Vito's apartment floods, the kids try to find an apartment that suits him best.

programme.title: The Loud House: Cover Girls/ Save the Date
programme.desc: All 10 of Lincoln's sisters ask him to cover for them on the same day. Bobby and Lori go on a double date with Lincoln and Ronnie Anne.

programme.title: The Loud House: Out of the Picture/ Room With a Feud
programme.desc: Afraid they'll be forgotten, Lincoln and Clyde want to make a splash in the yearbook and crash group photos. Seeing his sisters fight with their roommates, Lincoln suggests a room shuffle based on a compatibility test.

programme.title: The Loud House: Picture Perfect/ Undie Pressure
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to take the "perfect" family photo for his parents' anniversary gift. Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Arr in the Family/ Finders Weepers
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne wants to help CJ to get onstage at a Pirate Dinner Show. Then, Ronnie and Sid decide whether to take money from a lost coin purse they found at the mercado.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pull Up a Barrel/ Company Picnic
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs regales SpongeBob with tales from his old Navy days. Later, Mr. Krabs throws a company picnic to boost morale, but Plankton is hosting his own on the same day!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Rocket/ Squeaky Boots
programme.desc: Bob and Pat accidentally launch Sandy's rocket ship into space; boots in lieu of pay.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book
programme.desc: Squidard reads SpongeBob's diary out lout in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wormy/ Patty Hype
programme.desc: The gang thinks that Sandy's pet caterpillar has been consumed by a 'monster' butterfly; Bob markets his coloured crabcakes to the Krusty Krab's clientele.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chimps Ahoy/ Ghost House
programme.desc: The Chimpanzee beneficiaries of Sandy's undersea tree dome are paying a visit to see what progress she has made with her inventions. The Flying Dutchman takes up residence at SpongeBob's house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Grandma's Kisses/ Squidville
programme.desc: Bob's Grandma gives him a kiss in public; Squid decides to leave.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: All That Glitters/ Wishing You Well
programme.desc: SpongeBob's spatula breaks mid-patty flip; Mr. Krabs installs a wishing well near the Krusty Krab and sends SpongeBob down the well in a bucket to collect the coins.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Free Rides/ I'm Your Biggest Fanatic
programme.desc: Spongebob attempts and fails his driving test again; Bob tries to join a special club.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bummer Vacation/ Wigstruck
programme.desc: SpongeBob has never taken a vacation, so Krabs makes his #1 employee take the day off.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Deadly Venom
programme.desc: Karai is brainwashed and starts hunting the Turtles.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: Pteranodon't!
programme.desc: A young park guest accidentally strands himself in the Pteranodon aviary, requiring Owen and a testy Stygimoloch to stage a daring rescue.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: Blown Away!
programme.desc: It's deja vu for Alan Grant as he returns to Isla Nublar and winds up stranded in the jungle during a dangerous storm with injured Simon and hero-worshipping Owen.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Alvin's Secret Powers/ I Will Survive
programme.desc: Alvin tells Theodore that he has secret powers and can turn trash into candy. Later, when Alvin gets hurt, Simon agrees to face off against Derek on a survival reality show, where there's room for only one winner.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Simon the Superb/ The Sub
programme.desc: When Alvin makes fun of Simon's magic act, Simon challenges him to a magic duel. Who will win? The amazing Alvin or Simon the Superb? Alvin reluctantly signs up to teach the after school music class, but he finds his classmates treat him differently.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Art for Art's Sake/ Mancave
programme.desc: Brittany takes up painting to impress her fashion idol. But her idol only likes her art after Alvin accidentally ruins it. Alvin, convinced that Julie and her son are trying to move into their home, tries to stop it.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Baby Whisperer/ Let's Make a Deal
programme.desc: Alvin dresses Theodore up like a baby in order to impress the girl of his dreams. While attempting to make a special present for Dave, Alvin creates a snowball effect of chaos.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: I Will Survive/ Alvin's Got a Brand New Bag
programme.desc: When Alvin gets hurt, Simon agrees to face off against Derek on a survival reality show, where there's room for only one winner. Alvin accidentally ruins Brittany's favorite new bag and must come up with a way to replace it.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Dog Days/ Dragon Dad
programme.desc: The Chipmunks take in a stray dog, but have to keep the puppy hidden from Dave, who won't allow pets. Theodore orders a dragon egg in the hopes of it hatching into a real dragon.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Meet Cute Crush
programme.desc: Henry and Ray try to help Piper carry out a 'meet cute' with a new boy she likes from school.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Spelling Bee Hard
programme.desc: Dr. Minyak challenges Captain Man to a Spelling Bee.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Captain Man-kini
programme.desc: When a new internet celebrity is causing havoc in Swellview, Captain Man has to body swap with Frankini to infiltrate his secret lair.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Up the Stairs
programme.desc: Henry and Ray's friendship is put to the ultimate test when they have to make the half mile trek up the Man Cave stairs in order to make a surprise meal by a celebrity chef in Junk-N-Stuff.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Doubles Trouble
programme.desc: Phoebe signs up for a tennis tournament in order to win a membership at Link's family's country club. She enlists Max to use his powers to help her, but when he gets a taste for the country club life, her plans go awry.

programme.title: The Thundermans: It's Not What You Link
programme.desc: Phoebe comes up with a plan to help Max and Link become friends. When Link ends up spending more time with Max than her, Phoebe thinks her plan was too good.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Cape Fear
programme.desc: Phoebe and Max Thunderman seem to be regular teenage twins, but they're in a family of superheroes. Phoebe strives to be normal and use her powers for good, but Max embraces the dark side. Can life ever be normal in this family?

programme.title: The Thundermans: Call of Lunch Duty
programme.desc: Phoebe discovers that Max is the anonymous figure behind the latest rebellious pranks at school, but when she refuses to give up his secret to the principal, she must face the consequences.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Nickelodeon's Unfiltered: Robots Love Cereal!
programme.desc: Bleep bloop and crunch crunch! Host Jay Pharoah introduces two mystery celebs hiding behind 3D animated filters. Darci Lynne Farmer, Gabrielle Nevaeh Green and Lex Lumpkin ask questions and gather clues to unveil our special guests!

programme.title: All That
programme.desc: A trip to Coffee Coffee Coffee, Nathan cancels soup, camp gets weird when the kids from Stranger Things show up, and more.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Tour/ Dinner Party
programme.desc: Tilly takes Gramma out to be a tourist for a day. Cricket and Remy arrange a dinner party for everyone to get to know each other.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: DuckTales: Quack Pack!
programme.desc: The family is not quite themselves as they soon discover the planned family photo shoot might just be a part of a bigger 'wish' gone wrong!

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Fruit Scoot Boogie
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Lord of the Jump Kings
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Spear of Selene!
programme.desc: Donald is dragged into a feud between Scrooge and Zeus, while Dewey and Webby search for an artifact that may provide the truth about Dewey's mother.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Rumble for Ragnarok!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Uncaged
programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Internabout
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fan Friction
programme.desc: When Karmi starts posting fan fiction about Big Hero 6, depicting Hiro as her boyfriend, Hiro is embarrassed and wants her to stop.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Up All-Nighter
programme.desc: Facing a morning deadline, the crew pulls an all-nighter at Uncle Will's to edit the pranks and upload them to their channel in time. Meanwhile, Herman poses as a kid who thinks he's a medieval knight and convinces his babysitter to do whatever he says.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Dino Safari VR
programme.desc: Chance, Herman and Dusty are mesmerized by a new dinosaur virtual reality game which inspires a new set of pranks. Bailey disguises as a mind-melting robot from the future. An unsuspecting camp counselor believe he's discovered a spaceship in the woods.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Will vs. Will
programme.desc: The unexpected pranks get smellier and wilder when Uncle Will, Chance and Dusty pull off a fake commercial for "Stank Be Gone" foot spray and trick another target into thinking he's transporting a wild rhinoceros to the zoo.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: The Earth Gets Mooned
programme.desc: The gang takes part in an annual science competition at school, but they have trouble with their project partners.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Walk the Prank: K.C. Undercover Edition
programme.desc: The gang is undercover to take down a rival prank channel that is stealing ideas from them. Pranks feature Zendaya, Veronica and Kamil from the cast of K.C. Undercover.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Spoiler Alert
programme.desc: Chance's parents take away his TV privileges, so Chance goes to great lengths to keep the season finale of his favorite show unspoiled.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Duck Knight Returns!
programme.desc: When Scrooge and Dewey make a gritty Darkwing Duck movie, Launchpad teams up with the original Darkwing to stop it.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Richest Duck in the World!
programme.desc: Louie, Scrooge, and Owlson must escape from an unstoppable monster cursed to hunt down and destroy the richest duck in the world.

programme.title: DuckTales: Louie's Eleven!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Dragon vs. Apocalypse!
Yo-Kai Watch: Komasan in Love/ Yo-kai Duchoo/ Yo-kai Ake and Payn
programme.desc: A boy named Nate find a capsule which give him a Yo-Kai watch for identifying Yo-Kai.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Don't Ignore the Small Stufful!
DuckTales: Double-O-Duck in You Only Crash Twice!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: El Fuego
programme.desc: Professional mech-wrestler El Fuego is intent on becoming the toughest fighter in San Fransokyo and decides he must beat the strongest challenger he can find, Baymax.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Valentine's Dance/ Green Streets
programme.desc: At the Valentine’s Dance, Cricket develops an unwanted crush on Gabriella.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Blood Moon
programme.desc: Cricket is excited for his first Halloween in Big City, where he and Tilly expect to collect way more candy than they ever got Trick-or-Treating in the country.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Big Deal/ Forbidden Feline
programme.desc: Cricket persuades the family to hit up a Thanksgiving sale for a sweet deal on a new TV. Tilly hits it off with Anoosh, the neighborhood cat.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Green Christmas
programme.desc: Cricket becomes worried that he's not on Santa's 'Nice List' so he goes on a spree of good deeds. Gramma and Nancy go on a last minute search for Bill's gift.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Parade Day/ DIY Guys
programme.desc: Cricket leaves Gloria to work the coffee shop alone while he enjoys the parade on his break.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Coffee Quest/ Phoenix Rises
programme.desc: When Big City faces a coffee bean shortage, Cricket and Gloria’s boss, Ms. Cho, challenges them to retrieve one of a few remaining sacks of coffee; When the Greens' dog, Phoenix, runs away from home, the family sets out to find her.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Uncaged
programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: The Closer: Junk in the Trunk

programme.title: The Closer: Power of Attorney

programme.desc: A Revolutionary War re-enactment becomes the scene of a real killing when a soldier turns up dead. Maura's extensive knowledge of American history becomes important as she and Jane try to solve the case.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Bloodlines
programme.desc: Jane and the team investigate what appears to be a modern-day witch hunt in Salem. Meanwhile, Frankie's old girlfriend returns to town with a surprise and Jane has no problem speaking her mind about the problem.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: My Own Worst Enemy
programme.desc: Jane and Maura delve into a family's background when a man is killed in what appears to be a mugging gone wrong. Meanwhile, a romantic and mysterious figure from Maura's past shows up, causing a rift when Jane suspects Maura is hiding something.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Where the Wild Things Are
programme.desc: Meredith and her fellow residents, Alex, Izzie and Cristina, compete in a surgical contest, with Bailey serving as judge. Meanwhile, George and Lexie adjust to their new squalid apartment and Callie finds a friend, Cristina's nemesis, Erica Hahn.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Piece of My Heart

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: The Becoming

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Rude Awakening

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Crossing the Line

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: The Avatar Returns

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Chapter 3: The Southern Air Temple
programme.desc: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Chapter 4: The Warriors of Kyoshi
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity. Aang enjoys all the attention, but it ultimately leads to trouble. Meanwhile, Sokka faces his pre-conceived ideas about women when he meets some female warriors.

programme.title: Movie: Ice Age: Continental Drift
programme.desc: Three friends go on an adventure after their continent floats away. Using an iceberg as a boat, they face many challenges as they discover a new land they have never seen before.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's Dream

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Donor
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler search for the perfect male candidate who could inseminate Monica.

programme.title: Friends: The One in Barbados

programme.title: Mom: Death, Death, Death and a Bucket of Chicken

programme.title: Mom: Nazi Zombies and a Two-Hundred Pound Baby
programme.desc: Bonnie tries to get Christy to admit she still has feelings for her ex-husband, Baxter.

programme.title: Mom: Cornflakes and the Hair of Three Men

programme.title: Mom: Caperberries and a Glass Eye

programme.desc: Pat joins SpongeBob at boating school; Mr. Krabs takes Bob and Squid fishing.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Made Up Musical Instruments/ Butterflies/ The Botanical Gardens/ Viking Day / Mr. Potato's Quiz
programme.desc: The children make instruments from old packaging; Doctor Hamster talks about butterflies; Peppa and George go to the botanical gardens; Peppa and George pretend to be Vikings with Granny; Mr. Potato visits the school.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Pajama Party with Blue
programme.desc: It's a special nighttime game of Blue's Clues to figure out what Blue wants to do for her first pajama party.

programme.desc: When Ms. Marjorie brings her bookmobile to Everest and the kids of the mountains, Maynard accidentally sets the van rolling and goes off on a wild ride. Mayor Humdinger has been carving his face into the cliffs of Adventure.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: Too Bright for Movie Night!
