programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Space Alien Adventure!
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ make friends with a space alien named Gormy. But when Gormy's jetpack loses power, they set out to help him find six special space batteries so he can fly home to his alien family.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Dino Rescue: Pups and the Lost Dino Eggs
programme.desc: A lost world of Dinosaurs is discovered, Mayor Humdinger wants to take Dino Eggs back to Foggy Bottom.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Pterodactyl/ Pups and the Big Rumble
programme.desc: Maverick the daredevil Pterodactyl takes a tumble. A volcano is erupting, threatening the Dino Wilds.

programme.desc: 'The Insider' sends the sisters a tip that federal agents are targeting The Order in a raid on their businesses, and later sends a desperate plea for help when they suspect leaders have figured out their identity.

programme.title: Escaping Polygamy: Give Me Back My Daughters, Part 2
programme.desc: Jessica and Kollene continue the dangerous mission of helping Suzette find her daughter, Rosie, who years ago chose the religion over her very own mother. Suzette’s manipulative and potentially violent sister-wife is guarding Rosie’s every move.

programme.title: Intervention: Sam and Brad K
programme.desc: Sam lost custody of her son from a previous relationship, her career as a dental assistant, and recently contracted Hepatitis C. Brad has had multiple overdoses, lost his career, and lost his daughter from an earlier marriage.

programme.title: Intervention: Al
programme.desc: Al, a big guy with a big personality, is sacrificing his relationships with his wife and children to chase his out-of-control meth and painkiller addiction.

programme.title: Intervention: Michael
programme.desc: After a childhood of instability and a series of traumatic events, Michael began to use drugs. He is now a rambling, self-loathing addict, and his sons have become his using buddies. Michael needs an intervention to save him and his family.

programme.title: Intervention: Elena
programme.desc: At 63, Elena has developed a daily IV meth addiction, and she shows no sign that she wants to quit. Her children and grandchildren are desperate for her to get well.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Ike and Mike
programme.desc: Ike's twin brother pays a visit to ask a favor. Meanwhile, the crew takes DNA tests and get some shocking results.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Dance Moves and Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: Chaos breaks out when two teams of best friends enter the Pepperdome. Sweat will drip, dance moves will bust out, and one shirt will desperately need dry cleaning all for the chance to win $25,000.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: A Hot Mess
programme.desc: Fiery identical twins take on saucy drag queens in the Pepperdome. It's duke it out or puke it out in this episode where one player becomes very intimate with the Hot Ones' spit bucket.

programme.desc: An engaged couple is excited to buy their first home together in Cabo San Lucas. They're looking for an open concept floor plan that has ocean views, and room to host visiting family is a must, but they need to keep a strict budget for a beach wedding.

programme.title: Caribbean Life: Pulling the Trigger and Ending a Three-Year Search on Roatan
programme.desc: A real estate agent from California is fulfilling her dream and moving to Roatan with her yorkie, Tino. She's been searching for the perfect home for three years and needs her best friends help to find the right property.

programme.title: Caribbean Life: Debating Home vs Condo on St. John
programme.desc: A couple from Texas wants to live a stress-free life on the quiet island of St. John. He'd prefer a stand-alone home so their dog Barley has room to run around.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Generational Dreams
programme.desc: A Florida man who fondly remembers childhood summers spent in the Bahamas with his father is ready to pursue his father's dream of owning a home on the island. With his father smiling down, he and his wife seek a home to keep his legacy alive.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: From Garden State to State of Bliss
programme.desc: A New Jersey family celebrates a milestone birthday and looks for a place on Great Exuma. They want to be as close to the water as possible, and they're looking for a place they can also utilize as a rental property.

programme.title: Renovation Island: Out of Gas
programme.desc: Bryan's headaches continue as he turns his attention to the pool bar. Bryan and Sarah debate design decisions in the common areas. The industrial kitchen is delayed as the team struggles with the shipping timeline. The first villa is completed.

programme.title: Renovation Island: Bottoms Up
programme.desc: The Baeumlers navigate a new learning curve in hospitality as their build transitions to a business. Sarah and Bryan argue over projects that are still not finished, despite their ticking timeline.

programme.title: Home Town: Room to Grow
programme.desc: A couple with two kids are in desperate need of more space and hope to find a home with a big yard and studio for his work with an all-in budget of $200,000.

programme.title: Home Town: Small Town Sophistication
programme.desc: A couple that's moving back to Mississippi is looking for a spacious home for under $260,000 where they can host friends and throw parties.

programme.title: Home Town: A Vacation Every Day
programme.desc: A couple is moving their family of five inland for a new job. They are looking for a large home with architectural details and space for their three kids. Their budget goes a long way as they consider a 5,000-square-foot brick beauty.

programme.title: Home Town: Southern Coastal Style
programme.desc: With an all-in budget of $300,000, a couple is ready to move back home to Mississippi and put down roots after years of moving for work. They need help finding a home with charm and character in a small town.

programme.title: Home Town: The Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: A man who has always moved around and loves to travel and meet new people is looking for a large home. Ben and Erin can't believe their luck when he gives them a limitless budget to design a gorgeous retreat with a Spanish-style kitchen and master suite.

programme.title: Home Town: Inspired By the Sea
programme.desc: A woman who has been renting for years is ready to buy a home, and her wish list includes a master bathroom with a big bathtub. Ben and Erin capitalize on the charm of the house and design a Nantucket-inspired kitchen and a stunning master suite.

programme.title: Home Town: Town or Country
programme.desc: David and Taneia own a number of rental properties in Laurel and need Ben and Erin's help to help them choose which one will meet their needs as they enter their empty nester phase.

programme.title: Love It or List It: This Space Is Looking Up

programme.desc: Todd takes Savannah and Chase to New York City to teach them about the family fashion business. Savannah proves to be a perfect student, but the only thing Chase learns is how to pick up models.

programme.title: American Pickers: The Italian Job: Part One
programme.desc: In search of a rare race car for an important museum client, the guys travel to Italy for what could be the biggest deal of their lives.

programme.title: American Pickers: The Italian Job: Part Two
programme.desc: Mike and Frank are in Italy where they're determined to fill a shipping container with awesome artifacts they'd never find at home.

programme.title: American Pickers: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: After taking a joyride on a rare hundred-year-old monster tractor, Mike and his brother Robbie take to a property packed with amazing steam engines.

programme.title: American Pickers: Pinch Picker
programme.desc: With slim pickings in southern Florida, Mike and Frank finally stumble on a hurricane-ravaged barn. The guys scour a millionaire's awesome collection where they spring for a mysterious car part that may be worth a fortune.

programme.title: American Pickers: Red, White and Blues
programme.desc: The guys unearth a music jackpot in an old general store, and a hoarder house holds on to its secrets.

programme.title: American Pickers: The Maineiacs

programme.title: American Pickers: Sgt. Picker's Lonely Hearts Club
programme.desc: At an old school drive-in, Mike and Danielle uncover a vintage reel of Beatles' footage that could be the only one of its kind.

programme.title: American Pickers: No Stoner Left Unturned

programme.title: American Pickers: This One Stings
programme.desc: Mike makes a mistake in Indiana, and while the guys get a warm reception from a carnie collector in Ohio, the pick brings an unexpected sting.

programme.title: American Pickers: Can't Catch a Break

programme.title: Jessie: Understudied and Overdone

programme.desc: A covert identity created for one of Gibbs' undercover cases 20 years ago resurfaces after a murder victim is found living under the alias.

programme.title: NCIS: Patience

programme.title: World's Deadliest Sharks

programme.desc: Find out how belts, 3D metal printers, detectable warning panels, and model Stirling engines are made.

programme.desc: Find out how ultra-thin glass, pallet dismantling machines, cupcakes, and seamless stainless steel tubes are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Orthodontic Retainers, Orange Juice, Retractable Saunas, and Sawmill Knives
programme.desc: Find out how orthodontic retainers, orange juice, retractable saunas, and sawmill knives are made.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Wrath of the Minotaur
programme.desc: A new excavation at the mysterious home of the Minoans leads to a startling discovery about real-life origins of the Minotaur, and experts decode artifacts that point to bloody human sacrifices for the ferocious monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Blood for the Snake God
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the bloody origin of the feathered snake god, and experts investigate why the ancient Mesoamericans believed that human sacrifice was the only way to appease the deadly monster.

programme.title: Loch Ness Monster: New Evidence: Beneath the Waves
programme.desc: Professor Neil Gemmell uses cutting-edge environmental DNA science to unravel the centuries-old mystery of the Loch Ness monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Wrath of the Minotaur
programme.desc: A new excavation at the mysterious home of the Minoans leads to a startling discovery about real-life origins of the Minotaur, and experts decode artifacts that point to bloody human sacrifices for the ferocious monster.

programme.title: Loch Ness Monster: New Evidence: Beneath the Waves
programme.desc: Professor Neil Gemmell uses cutting-edge environmental DNA science to unravel the centuries-old mystery of the Loch Ness monster.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Revenge of the Cyclops
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that the cyclops, a one-eyed cannibal, could have been more than just a story.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy
programme.desc: The Screaming Mummy is one of Egypt's greatest mysteries: a mummy with a terrifying expression frozen in agony. New discoveries reveal the connection between this horrific discovery and a pharaoh's murder, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City
programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Mummy Mysteries: Who is the Younger Lady?
programme.desc: The mutilated mummy of the Younger Lady has mystified Egyptologists for over a hundred years. New evidence finally reveals who she was and why her brutal death is directly linked to the world-famous Tutankhamun.

programme.title: Mummy Mysteries: Egypt's Lost Queen
programme.desc: A brand-new discovery inside a 3,000-year-old treasure chest may lead experts to the Egyptian pharaoh who was erased from history: a woman named Hatshepsut, who was one of the most controversial and successful pharaohs of all time.

programme.title: Mummy Mysteries: Who Killed the Warrior King?
programme.desc: The mangled mummy of Pharaoh Seqenenre Taa is a murder mystery that endures to this day. A team of the world's leading Egyptologists and crime experts embark on a spectacular journey to discover the truth behind his brutal and humiliating death.

programme.title: Mummy Mysteries: The Screaming Mummy Conspiracy
programme.desc: The horrifying remains of the 3,000-year-old Screaming Mummy have haunted Egyptologists for decades. A team of experts re-examine the evidence, revealing an epic conspiracy to murder a king and a punishment intended to curse a soul for eternity.

programme.title: The Last Days of Pompeii
programme.desc: New archaeological technology reveals the doomed city of Pompeii as it existed during its final hours, and using cutting-edge science, experts uncover the long-lost secrets and treasures buried by the ravages of apocalypse.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Ice Age or Hell Fire?
programme.desc: Geologist, Martin Pepper, and biologist, Liz Bonnin, explore North America to find evidence of the most powerful geological events the Earth has ever seen Ice Ages. Finding out how they have both carved the land but also moulded the life that lives on it.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Japanese Death Match
programme.desc: Liz and Martin visit Japan, to witness the battle that rages between the people and the land they live on. But how much of a threat do Japan's volcanoes, earthquakes and tsunamis pose?

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Will Europe Burn in Hell?
programme.desc: Biologist Liz Bonnin and Geologist Martin Pepper investigate the world's most dangerous volcano Mount Vesuvius only to discover that the three million people of Naples live in the shadow of another, much more deadly super volcano, called Campi Flegre.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Asteroid Armageddon
programme.desc: Martin and Liz investigate a giant asteroid impact that may have wiped out the dinosaurs 65 million years ago. Martin experiences the power of a NASA supergun, and Liz follows the geological clues to Mexico where she dives an underground river.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Can Krakatoa Stop Time?
programme.desc: An active volcano with the power to plunge the whole world into a brutal dark age is rising from the sea in the heart of the Asia. It's done it before, and it will erupt again.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: Firefighter Sam Dreher and his wife Danielle are the perfect couple. But after their hopes of happiness are dashed, their marriage fails. When Sam falls in love with another woman, his affair triggers a chain of events that spirals out of control.

programme.title: Web of Lies: D is for Deadly
programme.desc: Dallas teen track star Shania Gray is left traumatized after being raped while babysitting. When a new Facebook friend offers support, she opens up to him.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Webcam of Lies
programme.desc: When a hopeful 12-year-old singer looks for fame online using her webcam, she gathers many admirers, and soon finds a boy who flatters her so much she falls for him. But her dreams become her worst nightmare when a shocking photo is shared online.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Last Blanco
programme.desc: Michael Blanco never doubted the violent things his mother did were to keep their family safe until one day he learned the truth.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Plot to Kill Dr. Sievers
programme.desc: '48 Hours' investigates the death of a Florida doctor and the wild story that led to murder. Prosecutors say a man hired a look-alike to kill his wife, Dr. Teresa Sievers, who was found bludgeoned to death in her kitchen.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Heartbreaking Discovery
programme.desc: When a young mother disappears police painstakingly retrace her last known movements. The trail of clues they uncover leads to a shocking and heartbreaking discovery.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: In the Wind
programme.desc: A daughter's quest to see her birth mother's murder solved is complicated

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Plot to Kill Dr. Sievers
programme.desc: '48 Hours' investigates the death of a Florida doctor and the wild story that led to murder. Prosecutors say a man hired a look-alike to kill his wife, Dr. Teresa Sievers, who was found bludgeoned to death in her kitchen.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Heartbreaking Discovery
programme.desc: When a young mother disappears police painstakingly retrace her last known movements. The trail of clues they uncover leads to a shocking and heartbreaking discovery.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Stacy's Story
programme.desc: A mother finds her teenage daughter savagely murdered inside their own home. A few drops of blood discovered decades later may be the key to solving the tragic mystery.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Trapped in Hell
programme.desc: Lindsay Wrinkles always knew that her father had a short temper, but she never expected to be on the run from him when she was only 14. As she runs from hideout to hideout desperate to evade him, Lindsay wonders what will happen if he ever finds her.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Where's Crystal
programme.desc: When a young mother disappears on a busy Fourth of July weekend it marks the beginning of a disturbing mystery, one that will devastate a loving family and tear a small community apart.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Stolen Dreams
programme.desc: A young woman is found savagely murdered in her new home. Will the trail of clues police discovered lead them to her killer?

programme.title: Deadly Women: Self-Made Widows
programme.desc: When these women fell out of love they didn't walk away; they chose a permanent separation with financial benefits. They all wanted to be single but with no strings attached; they were 'Self Made Widows'.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Never Too Old
programme.desc: They look like sweet grannies but they prove murder has no age limit. A grandma's need to control her grandson takes a deadly turn; a retirement home romance meets a lethal end; and an ageing gold-digger preys on her final victim.

programme.title: Deadly Women: For the Money Honey
programme.desc: For these women, one good man wasn't enough. A middle-aged woman used looks to prey on elderly gentleman; an army wife didn't want a soldier but a squad; and a serial wife cooks up meals to die for. These Deadly Women married for the money, honey.

programme.title: Betrayed: Coed Killer
programme.desc: Angela Samota is every coed's dream come true. She's smart, beautiful, and always the epicenter of every room she enters - but one day she's noticed by the wrong person, and it leads to her ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Betrayed: Life and Limb
programme.desc: Jay Orbin is living the American Dream; he's a self-made millionaire with a loving family and beautiful wife. But when his headless torso is found in the desert, his cut-throat business and seemingly perfect life reveal some very dark secrets.

programme.title: Betrayed: Strangled by Love
programme.desc: Pretty, vivacious Dana Laskowski is busy juggling a boyfriend, a jealous ex-husband, a secret lover, and, most importantly, single mom responsibilities. She feels she's finally found the right balance when her life is cut short by someone close.

programme.title: Betrayed: Family Fatale
programme.desc: Ruie Ann Park is the J.R. Ewing of Van Buren, AR – wealthy and sharp-tongued, but fair. She rules with her town with wit and flair, until her son's increasingly scandalous lifestyle and others' lust for her money bring her to a bitter, horrific end.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: This Just In
programme.desc: After college co-ed Jessica O'Grady vanishes late one night after leaving to see her boyfriend, locals are left to wonder if she was kidnapped.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Local Girl Gone
programme.desc: A high school freshman disappears. As hours turn to days, her family and town residents wonder if a killer is in the midst.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Unsafe Anywhere
programme.desc: 21 year old Joel Larson is shot to death in a safe haven community for gay people in 1990's Minneapolis. Two more shootings terrorize the community as they realize a serial killer in disguise lives among them.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hold the Line
programme.desc: In August 1992, millionaire Tennessee landowner Allen Roberts arrives home to discover his wife is missing. He tells police he received a ransom call for Doe's safe return. Slowly, the town turns on Allen: until police take note of one odd neighbor.

programme.title: Weaponology: US Airborne
programme.desc: The United States Airborne are America's sky soldiers. They strike from above, hitting the enemy hard and fast.Weaponology takes you back through time to take a closer look at the men, machines and moments that shaped America's premier strike force.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General, Hideki Tojo, is a cold blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: By the beginning of 1945, Japan's situation was desperate. Its navy and naval air power had effectively ceased to exist, while U.S. carriers and amphibious forces roamed at will across the Pacific Ocean, attacking Japanese-occupied islands.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War

programme.desc: Japanese General, Hideki Tojo, is a cold blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: For decades UFO research has been directed to the skies, but newly declassified documents, along with advances in technology are leading UFO researchers to believe that UFOs may also be inhabiting oceans.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Area 52
programme.desc: Few have ever heard about the ultra top-secret military base in the remote deserts of Utah known as Area 52.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Pilots and Astronauts

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: High-End Timber Frame Kitchen In Brevard, Nc

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Memory Lane

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Inspirations Brewing
programme.desc: When Chase and his brother-in-law learn that the owner of their latest cabin project works at Allagash Brewing Company, they're excited to check out the brewery for inspiration as they turn the weekend getaway into a three-season home away from home.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Pilsbury Family Rafting Cabin
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned Maine cabins. They give these forlorn properties the facelift they've needed for decades. You never know what you might find when you go for a walk.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Six Weeks For Two A-Frames
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate two A-Frames in Sugarloaf Valley. With only six weeks to accomplish both renovations, Chase splits the team down the middle. A friendly wager allows the winning team to dress the losing team up at dinner.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ho-Ho-Home!
programme.desc: Doug, aka Santa, and his wife Lois inherited a 1,250-square-foot cabin that's been in her family since 1958. With no major renovations since the 1970s, Chase and the team are excited to perform a Christmas miracle and transform this cabin.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Tucson
programme.desc: Adam goes to Tucson for a hot dog wrapped in bacon and covered in all the fixins.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Mighty Meatless

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Seafood Sampler
programme.desc: Noah Cappe dives into the fairground for some of the yummiest seafood snacks on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Local Legends

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Tons of Taters
programme.desc: Ingenious fair vendors use the humble potato to create some amazing and original midway food.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Campfire Creations

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Nacho, Nacho Man
programme.desc: Noah Cappe tries some of the wackiest and wildest nacho combinations on the midway.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brisket For Breakfast

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Fix Four Ways

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Illinois State Fair/ Erie County Fair

programme.title: Carnival Eats: K-Days/ North Dakota State Fair

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Canadian National Exhibition/ Prairiefest

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Michigan to Maize
programme.desc: Noah gets busy with the" Soul on a Roll" sandwich, and the "To Die For" casserole. Salted caramel apple gelato is the thing to beat the heat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Cornfields to Canada
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off in Polk County, Minnesota, where he goes local with the North Woods sandwich and Barbe-chos. Then it’s across the border to the Red River Exhibition to experience a Canadian classic, prairie poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Heatwave to Heartland

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From West Coast to Wisconsin
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe starts the day off right with breakfast on a stick, and gets to down to business with the pink taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Rock 'n' Roll to Red River

programme.title: Man v. Food: Philadelphia, Pa

programme.title: Man v. Food: Seattle, Washington

programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Failure Mode
programme.desc: Hiro becomes demoralized when his latest school project fails spectacularly.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Write Turn Here

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Star Comes to Earth/ Party With a Pony
programme.desc: Fun-loving magical teen princess, Star Butterfly, who after a few skirmishes with other-worldly monsters, is sent by her Royal Parents to live with the Diaz family on Earth, bringing along her own unique inter-dimensional style to her new planet.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Blood Moon Ball/ Fortune Cookies
programme.desc: Star accepts her ex-boyfriend Tom's invitation to Demon Prom, but Marco is suspicious of Tom's intentions and crashes the prom to prevent Star from getting her heart broken again.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Interdimensional Field Trip/ Marco Grows a Beard
programme.desc: Star leads a class field trip to a museum in another dimension and puts the entire class in danger. Then, when Star flubs the spell used to help Marco grow a beard, the beard grows out of control and engulfs the house.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Storm the Castle
programme.desc: When Marco is captured by Toffee and held for wand-ransom, Star enters into an unlikely alliance with Ludo and Buff Frog.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Goblin Dogs/ By the Book
programme.desc: Star and her friends wait in the longest food truck line ever for the universe's best hot dog, the Goblin Dog. Then, after an argument with Star, Glssaryk goes into hiding in a donut box. While they are occupied, Ludo plots to capture Star.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Sleepover/ Gift of the Card
programme.desc: It's Star's slumber party and Ponyhead suggests they play a game she brought from Mewni. Marco has to use a gift card that Star gave him before it expires.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Family Legacy/ Paint Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there’s treasure buried on their property.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne

programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)
programme.desc: In April 1973, 24-year-old Edmund Kemper had murdered six coeds in and around the city of Santa Cruz, California, shaking the community to its core.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Strange Case of Jeffrey Dahmer
programme.desc: The chilling account of a man who survived his encounter with the notorious serial killer, who managed to evade police scrutiny for years.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Drew Peterson: Killer Charm

programme.title: Very Scary People: Dr. Death: A License to Kill

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: The murder of a prominent businessman in Colorado is particularly difficult to solve since the killers left virtually no forensic evidence at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot

programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: It took a murder victim's 9 year-old child, notations in a diary, and forensic psychology to determine which forensic evidence was important and which to ignore.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, which appears to have been set deliberately.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flower Power
programme.desc: Two different men call police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Reigning for Benji's

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Full Throttle: Smooth as Tennessee
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: Nashville calls out the MSO to see who truly runs the Tennessee streets. Both Ziptie and Heifer are out of commission, but Memphis never backs down from a challenge.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Holding a Grudge
programme.desc: The MSO is surprised when a group of racers claiming to be from Delaware turns out to be a team of racers from all over America. Then Grudge Night begins. The 405 and Texas keep their data to themselves, leaving racers without teams struggling to keep up.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Bad Chadillac
programme.desc: Small-town custom car fabricator Chad Hiltz takes on his first build under his new banner at Hiltz Automotive. The team takes a stubborn '57 Cadillac and transforms it into a futuristic, chromed-out roadster fit for a king.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Frankensteined Ford
programme.desc: The guys put a '68 Ford F-100 truck together by combining parts from other cars that shouldn't go together. Rich relives his youth with a '77 Trans Am Firebird.

programme.desc: The MSO is surprised when a group of racers claiming to be from Delaware turns out to be a team of racers from all over America. Then Grudge Night begins. The 405 and Texas keep their data to themselves, leaving racers without teams struggling to keep up.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Lighted Up

programme.title: Moonshiners: Foraging for a Long Winter Ahead

programme.title: Moonshiners: Last Nail in the Coffin

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Million Dollar Bet

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Start Up Or Die Trying
programme.desc: Billionaire Glenn Sterns hits a breaking point that sends him to the hospital and threatens to shut down his mission to identify a new business and grow it to a $1-million valuation in just 90 days.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Take The Bull By The Horns

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: House of Cards

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: No Pain, No Gain

programme.title: Extreme Unboxing: Bride in a Box
programme.desc: Joe and Jessica may break their bank after buying some broken tools, Steve and Steph invest in a pallet of health and beauty supplies, and Salena buys a shipment of wedding dresses behind Bobby's back.

programme.title: Extreme Unboxing: Gut Feelings
programme.desc: Bobby and Salena's shipment of returned sleeping bags leaves them in the cold, Jessica's 'gut feeling' for an orange rug may be a total bust, and Blake and Max must fix a defective scooter.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Buy, Buy Birdie
programme.desc: The buyers roll into the city of Chino, Calif. Darrell gives Brandon a chance in the driver's seat. Jarrod and Brandi discover a 'big boy' unit. Dave Hester buys in bulk and wins big. Barry buys a locker that will soar with the eagles.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Portrait of the Gambler
programme.desc: The buyers return to Montebello, Calif., where Dave Hester finds some marketing Americana and Barry buys a sweet unit.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Full Monty-Bello
programme.desc: Dave Hester heads straight to the bank, and Jarrod and Brandi leave the auction wishing they never came.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Return of the King of Montebello
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi split up, and only time will tell if it's for good. Ivy has hired a new employee to run his shop. Darrell's Montebello magic strikes again, and Rene learns the art of stripping.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Zen Masters of the Universe
programme.desc: Rene is being groomed to take over the competition, while Ivy learns a lesson that changes his tune about locker buying.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Man in Black is Back
programme.desc: Everyone is shocked to see Dave Hester return to the auctions with a vengeance, but even the Mogul can't stop the buyers from scoring great units in Huntington Beach. Also, Darrell tries to get Brandon in 'tip-top' shape, and Ivy must change up his game.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Once Upon a Locker in the West
programme.desc: The buyers head to Santa Ana, CA where dreams of great lockers spice up the auction. Jarrod and Brandi get a locker that leads to the sweet life while Mary tries to get something more collectable.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Mr. Nezhoda's Opus
programme.desc: Dan and Laura take the buyers back to Torrance for an auction that has them battling for the best unit of the day. Ivy changes up his game to stunning results, Brandi puts Jarrod on a harsh budget and Dave takes on Rene against every locker.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crickets
programme.desc: The perfect place to film an IJ challenge. The customers after consuming Q's hot dog smoothie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Find out which two Jokers know how to practice transcendental meditation and which boy band member the guys met at Carnegie Deli.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Find out which joker once included inline skating as a skill on his resume, who was a mathlete and a bowler in high school and which joker was afraid of the dark as a child.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Lost Shark
programme.desc: Forrest Galante heads to the Maldives to find a supposedly extinct shark. Unidentified sharks in the area have led many to believe it's alive. He will dive into an untamed wilderness to answer once and for all is the Pondicherry extinct or alive.

programme.title: Air Jaws: Ultimate Breach Off
programme.desc: Three teams of researchers return to one of the last hunting grounds for Air Jaws. They will use decoys, drones and underwater cameras to count the number of breaches and collect data on hunting techniques to see if the shark population is rebounding.

programme.title: Jaws Awakens
programme.desc: Jeff Kurr and Dickie Chivell are joined by shark expert Chris Fallows in the search for the world's largest male great white shark, and they find an almost 20-foot long, two-ton shark in the waters of New Zealand.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Naked and Afraid of Sharks
programme.desc: Five 'Naked and Afraid' all-stars must survive 14 days in shark-infested waters.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Unseen Assailant
programme.desc: Paul is leading a canoe safari near Victoria Falls when a hippo bursts to the surface and drags him into the water. In Texas, five-year-old Jade DeMoss is outside, looking for her mother, when an animal pounces on her and attacks.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Surviving for my Son
programme.desc: Wayne Petteway is attacked by an alligator while checking crab pots with his brother in North Carolina. In Arizona, Peter Baca is camping with his girlfriend and one-year-old son when he is awoken by something attacking him through the walls of the tent.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Welcome to Our World
programme.desc: A baby klipspringer is born on one of the coldest nights of the season and is miraculously nursed back to health. The California condor team at the Safari Park goes to unbelievable lengths to save this highly endangered species.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Yeti and the Cubs
programme.desc: There will be no peace in the world for the hamadryas baboons until Impo finds his mate. Luckily, the San Diego Zoo keepers have a plan. Two young cheetah cubs are training to become animal ambassadors with the help of their experienced canine guide.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: New Day for an Old Tortoise
programme.desc: Hunter the koala is ready for a mate. Jaws the Galápagos tortoise isn't feeling well and the zoo staff works to bring him out of his shell. The Safari Park has not one but two baby giraffe calves that need to be hand-reared simultaneously.

programme.title: The Zoo: Wallaby in the City
programme.desc: A rowdy, young markhor is injured and vets must treat his infected hoof. The TAB staff head to Manhattan to rescue a wallaby living in an apartment, while a fruit bat discovers how to spread her wings, and a trio of alligators move into their summer home.

programme.title: The Zoo: Wild Dogs on the Move
programme.desc: A trio of rare Dhole canines are prepared to make their cross-country journey to the zoo, and keepers anxiously await their arrival. A tinamou chick must be hand-reared, while a specialized tool is welded to extract a tusk from a charming Babirusa.

programme.title: The Zoo: Tiger's Day at the Dentist
programme.desc: The staff is hopeful for a successful breeding season when Mshango the giraffe meets the females of the herd. Power tools are needed for an Amur tiger's root canal, while Louie the swan falls ill, jeopardizing his release.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Rare Egg
programme.desc: It's a series of firsts when the Central Park Zoo welcomes its first-ever Atlantic puffin chick. A rhino called Penny undergoes a series of allergy tests, while an endangered species of gecko welcomes her first hatchling.

programme.title: The Zoo: Cougar Cub Rescue
programme.desc: A trio of abandoned puma cubs arrives at the zoo, while the staff grows concerned that Ella, the oldest rhino, is not acting herself. Meanwhile, a Caribbean flamingo is born at the zoo after nearly two decades, and Otto the stallion makes his debut.

programme.title: The Zoo: Porcupine Blind Date
programme.desc: The zoo opens an endangered turtle species facility, while Malayan tigers Suhanna and Rimba struggle to breed, because Rimba seems disinterested. Needles the porcupine gets a new mate, and the Guar herd eagerly await the arrival of new calves.

programme.title: The Zoo: Penguins In Love
programme.desc: Seven "Little Blues" join the penguin exhibit and are quick to mingle with the rest of the colony. When a honey-loving grizzly slows her step, the staff grows concerned. A turtle can't seem to get along with the alligators, and a nyala calf is born.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Terror in Paradise
programme.desc: On a family trip to Pattaya, Thailand, Helen Costigan is attending an elephant show when one of the massive beasts turns deadly. Golf ball recovery specialist Scott Lahodik is diving in a Florida lake when he's attacked by a vicious alligator.

programme.title: Movie: The Players Club
programme.desc: A story about the ruthless characters who hang out at a local gentlemen's only club.

programme.title: In Search Of: The Lost Colony of Roanoke
programme.desc: 400 years ago, 117 English colonists vanished from their settlement without a trace. We look for clues that point where the colony once stood, then conduct DNA testing to determine if there were any survivors.

programme.title: Roanoke: Search for the Lost Colony
programme.desc: Historians and stone masons come together to solve the mystery of the lost American colony of Roanoke. Led by David LaVere, the team attempts to authenticate the first stone that was found, and takes part in an unprecedented excavation.

programme.title: Haunted History: Salem Witch Trials
programme.desc: In 1692, 19 innocent people were hanged and one was pressed to death for the practice of witchcraft. Today, Salem, Massachusetts is a town renowned for its numerous accounts of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Haunted History: The Torso Murders
programme.desc: The Great Depression of the 1930s saw many of the poor move into shantytowns. One such shanty was terrorized by The Mad Butcher of Kingsbury Run, who was never identified or apprehended.

programme.title: Haunted History: A Deadly Possession
programme.desc: A man experienced paranormal activity after purchasing an unassuming wine box and sold it online where it was bought by a museum director in the Midwest who experienced the same things.

programme.title: Haunted History: Lost Souls of Pennhurst
programme.desc: In the early 1900s, Pennhurst Asylum became overcrowded, which resulted in an overwhelmed staff and rampant abuse. It was finally shut down, but it is said the ghosts of patients and employees still roam the halls today.

programme.title: Haunted History: Murder Castle
programme.desc: Just down the road from the 1893 Chicago's World Fair, H. H. Holmes was building a hotel designed for murder, which would later be known as 'The Murder Castle'. Today, the spirits of his victims attempt to tell the truth behind the story.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVII

programme.title: The Simpsons: G.I. D'oh

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moe'N'A Lisa

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Wife Aquatic

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Mac and Charlie Die
programme.desc: Mac and Charlie are afraid that Mac's recently released convict father is coming to get them. They decide to fake their own deaths in order to get out of his revenge.

programme.title: Secrets of the Bull Shark
programme.desc: Secrets of the Bull Shark unravels the mystery of some of the most dangerous predators.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Will Hawaii Sink L.A.?
programme.desc: Liz and Martin travel to the tropical paradise of Hawaii to investigate how evidence of catastrophic events in its geological past reveal a pattern of destruction that stretches back millions of years.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Will Iceland Poison the Skies?
programme.desc: Martin and Liz explore Iceland to see if its volcanoes could spread global chaos in the future. Martin samples an insane motorsport on ashy slopes, and Liz has the dive of a lifetime between the continental plates of North America and Europe.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: The Rockies Built the Atom Bomb
programme.desc: Geologist, Martin Pepper, and biologist, Liz Bonnin, travel to the iconic Rocky Mountains, to reveal the extraordinary link between the Rockies' soaring peaks and the uranium that ended up in 'Little Boy', the atomic bomb detonated over the Japanese city.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: NASA footage and interviews with the astronauts and scientists reveal some of the strange cases NASA has encountered.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: NASA footage and interviews with the astronauts and scientists reveal some of the strange cases NASA has encountered.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Vegas UFO
programme.desc: After cameras capture footage of a UFO over Las Vegas, officials claim it's just a meteor, but some suspect something far stranger. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of an alien visit or a top-secret military project.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Moon's Strange Secret
programme.desc: The last humans to walk on the moon discover something strange on the lunar surface. A NASA scientist investigates a strange phenomenon responsible for horrific mass deaths. A landmark NASA mission threatens to destroy the reputation of an American hero.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Vegas UFO
programme.desc: After cameras capture footage of a UFO over Las Vegas, officials claim it's just a meteor, but some suspect something far stranger. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of an alien visit or a top-secret military project.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did Aliens Nuke Mars?
programme.desc: Experts investigate if an extraterrestrial Armageddon transformed Mars into the wasteland we know today, after a strange discovery by the Curiosity rover suggests the Red Planet was home to an alien nuclear war 300 million years ago.

programme.title: Alien Planet Earths
programme.desc: The search for Earth's twin is the hottest topic in astronomy. Thanks to NASA's ground-breaking Kepler mission, astronomers believe there are over 20 billion alien worlds with liquid water and therefore the potential for life.

programme.title: Aliens: The Definitive Guide: What to Expect
programme.desc: Aliens exist. Scientists lay out what we can expect them to be like by grappling with difficult questions.

programme.title: Aliens: The Definitive Guide: How to Prepare
programme.desc: Inject a dose of cutting-edge research into an action-packed journey through space, to find out exactly whether aliens might come here, and how to prepare when they arrive.This everything you need to know; it's the definitive guide.

programme.title: Clash of the Dinosaurs: Extreme Survivors
programme.desc: 120 million years of evolution made the body of the dinosaurs better able to adapt to the environment then the bodies of any mammals to date. Science examines the secrets of how they became such incredible survivors.

programme.title: Clash of the Dinosaurs: Perfect Predators
programme.desc: The Cretaceous Period spawned the walking death machines, made of speed, eyesight and brainpower with razor sharp implements.

programme.title: Clash of the Dinosaurs: The Defenders
programme.desc: Plant eaters not predators are dominating the Cretaceous and their bodies can handle it.

programme.title: Clash of the Dinosaurs: Generations
programme.desc: Many generations adapted the dinosaurs to the challenges of the planet.

programme.title: Lost Beasts of the Ice Age
programme.desc: New discoveries in a mysterious Siberian cave could bring woolly mammoths and other long-dead Ice Age beasts back to life, and using the latest tech, experts race to unearth precious DNA from their mummified remains in a cutting-edge cloning experiment.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Dinosaur Cowboys
programme.desc: On the series premiere of Dino Hunters, dinosaur fossil season has begun and Montana rancher Clayton Phipps finds what might be an extremely rare and valuable fossil on his family's property. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and his son uncover a triceratops horn.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Million-Dollar Dino
programme.desc: Clayton Phipps continues his excavation of a rare, carnivorous dinosaur on his Montana ranch. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and son Jake prepare to sell their prized T-Rex fossil. Aaron Bolan hunts for an Ankylosaurus.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Curse of the Carnivore
programme.desc: Clayton Phipps and his team prepare to flip a 20,000-pound carnivore fossil out of the earth and onto a flatbed to get it to the lab for analysis. Meanwhile, Mike Harris hunts for a duckbill skull and Jared Hudson uncovers an ancient reptile.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Shots Fired
programme.desc: Clayton must haul his 20,000-pound dinosaur fossil over 200 miles to a lab where it will finally be identified. The Harris/Bolan clan chases poachers off of their land and Jared makes a last-ditch effort to bring in some money this season.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: We're Watching You
programme.desc: 40 year-old Rachael Anderson, mother of four, calls an old friend one Friday evening in April 2010 about a home improvement project she'd never complete. Eight years later, she's still missing, and two men are behind bars.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Death Before Dawn
programme.desc: In Orange County, California, screams of terror ring out from the home of multimillionaires. A series of clues lead the police on a hunt to find a wealthy couple's killer and bring justice to their five now orphaned children.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Blood In the Sand
programme.desc: In 1984, the body of a 14-year old girl is discovered on the beach in San Diego, CA and police think it's related to the murder of another teen. After years of mystery, a clue yields an unbelievable suspect.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Unicorn Killer
programme.desc: A Philadelphia woman disappears in the fall of 1977. Later, police come to learn the terrifying truth about her whereabouts, but struggle to locate and bring in her killer.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Hustlers
programme.desc: The real-life story that inspired a hit movie. A group of strip club workers take business into their own hands going as far as conspiring to drug male targets and fleece them for all they could.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The Night Shift
programme.desc: Single mother Barbara Nunn relocates to Florida, but she struggles to find her way. After she lands a job at a local diner, it appears her troubles are finally behind her. But then one night, a surprise confrontation with customers ends in murder.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: No End In Sight
programme.desc: Debbie Puglisi is enjoying life with her husband of nearly 25 years, Nino, in their new dream home. But when an unexpected visitor drops by the neighborhood, Debbie's whole world becomes her worst nightmare in a matter of minutes.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Hustlers
programme.desc: The real-life story that inspired a hit movie. A group of strip club workers take business into their own hands going as far as conspiring to drug male targets and fleece them for all they could.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The Night Shift
programme.desc: Single mother Barbara Nunn relocates to Florida, but she struggles to find her way. After she lands a job at a local diner, it appears her troubles are finally behind her. But then one night, a surprise confrontation with customers ends in murder.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: Single mom Tracy is starting to turn her life around when she falls for attentive Jody. As his jealousy starts to overtake their relationship, she soon comes to realize she can run, but she can't hide.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Blood In the Sand
programme.desc: In 1984, the body of a 14-year old girl is discovered on the beach in San Diego, CA and police think it's related to the murder of another teen. After years of mystery, a clue yields an unbelievable suspect.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Two Sides of Charlotte
programme.desc: Two sides of Charlotte collide when Detective Garry McFadden finds himself investigating the murder of a beloved elderly 'church lady' from 'old Charlotte money' who was robbed and attacked in her home as she returned from church.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Kross Kountry Kriminal
programme.desc: Charlotte, NC Homicide Detective Garry McFadden must delve into the dark world of White Supremacy in order to take down a slippery murder suspect who flees town and leads the investigator on a cross-country chase.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Fear the Ether Man
programme.desc: A serial rapist known as the Ether Man lurks in the shadows of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Victims can't identify the masked attacker and worse still, it looks like he's expanding his hunting grounds.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Obsession Has Its Price
programme.desc: Bill Douglas is a respected doctor at Tufts University in Boston. But his focus isn't on science – it's on a bombshell prostitute he met in a red light district called the Combat Zone. Together, they lead double lives… leading to someone's murder.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Dr. Deception
programme.desc: When Jean Claude Dominique is the victim of a hit-and-run, his wife Eliette rushes to his side. It's there she comes face-to-face with his OTHER wife. It's her first glimpse into his double life that leads to her fighting for her own.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Recipe for Death
programme.desc: Eric gives up the Marines to follow his dream as a baker, and believes he's found the sweetest confection possible when he falls for Constance on a blind date. These foodies indulge in the good life until a seven-year itch is scratched by murder.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Black Pearl
programme.desc: Tammy Ellis likes bad boys and charismatic loner David Gatlin is right up her street. After a quickie marriage, David's dark history is revealed; an attempted divorce is the catalyst for a terrifying and bloody confrontation.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: A Thin Blue Line
programme.desc: Sheriff deputies with a perfect marriage reveal a shocking tale of good cop/ bad cop that can only end in a fugitive on the run.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Bloody Matrimony
programme.desc: Steve Dingle, a young Filipino immigrant, returns to his homeland to find a bride. It seems like a match made in heaven when he meets Cathy. But pressure builds in their marriage that will explode into infidelity, violence, and murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hot Tempers, Cold Hearts
programme.desc: When these Deadly Women turn green-eyed they reveal their hot tempers and cold hearts.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Teen Terror
programme.desc: If a teen's emotional changes become overwhelming, sometimes the results can be deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Boiling Point
programme.desc: A beautiful face can mask the ugliest of intentions.

programme.title: Deadly Women: The Takers
programme.desc: All of us would like a little extra cash, but only a few are prepared to steal a life to get it.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Funeral Pyres
programme.desc: Faced with the advancing Soviet troops, Nazi Germany decides to have the bodies of death camp victims dug up and burned in graves.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Judenfrei
programme.desc: After the EZG's intervention, Romania, Bulgaria, Hungary and the Baltic states are declared "Judenfrei": free of Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Mass Graves
programme.desc: The armies of the Third Reich invaded the USSR in 1941. Mobile commandos, the Einsatzgruppen, were following their advance to Stalingrad with the mission of eliminating all Jews on the conquered territories.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Time of Reckoning
programme.desc: After being judged at the Nuremberg trials, the majority of those responsible for the murders of nearly 1.5 million Jews would walk free in the 1950s.

programme.desc: After being judged at the Nuremberg trials, the majority of those responsible for the murders of nearly 1.5 million Jews would walk free in the 1950s.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Funeral Pyres
programme.desc: Faced with the advancing Soviet troops, Nazi Germany decides to have the bodies of death camp victims dug up and burned in graves.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: Air Aces: Red Tails
programme.desc: Pressure from African-American activist groups pushed President Roosevelt to initiate a Blacks-only fighter pilot training program during WWII.

programme.title: Air Aces: George Beurling
programme.desc: Canadian George Beurling broke every rule in the book yet became one of the greatest fighter pilots of World War II.

programme.title: Air Aces: Robin Olds
programme.desc: In July 1966, North Vietnam's fleet of MiG-21s is hammering the US Air Force. With the help of his pilots, Colonel Robin Olds masterminds Operation BOLO.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: One man, one weapon, lots of bullets. From the cumbersome but deadly Gatling gun to the lightweight, hand-held assassins of the modern battlefield, trace the men and the moments that developed the most deadly family of infantry weapons.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Centuries of technological innovation have resulted in the creation of rifles that can kill a man from 2,000 yards. The history of bullets, guns, sights, mechanisms, camouflage and tactics is revealed.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Bombers
programme.desc: Go inside the most dominant and lethal military aircraft. Including the bombers that won the war to the B-52, the stealth B-2 to the most advanced and top secret bombers of the future.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: ROVs
programme.desc: Go inside the robotic warriors and unmanned war machines that are taking their place on the front lines and spearheading a revolution on the modern battlefield.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Armor
programme.desc: A look at the most advanced armor technologies, from body armor to the heavy duty composites that make the Abrams tank the best protected and the most lethal vehicle on the modern battlefield.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Oyster Farm Shack
programme.desc: Ashley Morrill and her team of builders find themselves rebuilding an old oyster shack for a working oyster farm in Edgecomb, Maine.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Cabin Overhaul
programme.desc: It's a Cabin Masters conundrum as Chase and the team are challenged to take a former garage and turn it into a home that will comfortably accommodate six siblings and their seventeen kids.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Golden Years Family Camp
programme.desc: After buying her parents' old summer camp in Bridgton, a mother calls on the crew to help her completely renovate the home for her parents to retire in full-time. With a $40,000 budget and an open time line, the crew transform it into a retirement space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Teaching an Old Cabin New Tricks
programme.desc: For the past 20 years, a family has created lasting memories of their cabin overlooking Harpswell Sound, but the cabin is in need of some work to see the next 20 years and beyond.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Desert Pond Hideaway
programme.desc: Chase and the team travel to a secluded piece of land close to Desert Pond to help a couple turn their forgotten shack into a relaxing retreat. The couple have big ambitions leaving the crew stretching a $30,000 budget in only four weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Daggett Camp
programme.desc: Chase and team take on the Daggett Camp, which was owned by a famous Maine politician whose family wants to rehab it in only six weeks. A hidden surprise underneath the cabin threatens to derail the whole project.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Water You Waiting For?

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: This Hits the Spa

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: We're in Business
programme.desc: Mike and MJ decide to go into business together to buy houses and renovate them right. But MJ is in for a surprise when he discovers Mike has already purchased their first project, then finds another potential investment 3.5 hours away.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Demo, Digging and Dancing
programme.desc: Mike and MJ add a partial second story to the country house while dangerous structural issues in the river house force them to take down the roof and second floor walls.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions and Delays
programme.desc: Trusses go up at the river house until MJ learns that the permits for the new build have not yet been approved. Mike goes to the council meeting hoping to hear good news, but it's a waiting game in the meantime. Designer Sarah Richardson offers advice.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Here We Go Again
programme.desc: After MJ and Lisa's wedding, smooth sailing is wishful thinking as Mike and MJ are welcomed back to the river house by a river of muck. The deck posts and windows get installed as they rush to get the house closed in before the winter weather arrives.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: River House of Dreams
programme.desc: Designer Sarah Richardson is back at the country house with some valuable advice on the design of the master en-suite. Meanwhile at the suburban house, the guys use some cool technology to improve the home's energy efficiency.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Baltimore, MD
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epic eating expedition brings him to Baltimore for an out-of-this-world diner, a classic crab feast and a four-pound pho fight.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Savannah, GA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels down to Georgia to taste some the Savannah's best fried chicken, low country seafood boil and a four-pound pulled pork sandwich known only as the Pigzilla.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Green Bay
programme.desc: Adam is at the NFL's opening game in Green Bay to showcase the city's best eats.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Good Eats: Raw Ambition
programme.desc: Alton journeys through the history and science of the greatest of all raw meat dishes: steak tartare.

programme.title: Good Eats: Every Grain Old Is New Again
programme.desc: Ancient American grains like amaranth, chia and quinoa are making a comeback due to their versatility and nutritional content. Alton Brown shows how to make the most of these very old kitchen newcomers.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Oat Cuisine: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this episode from 2001 with new recipes for his favourite grain, including a no-cook overnight oat pudding and a flavor-charged granola, now with more nutrition!

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Flat Is Beautiful II: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown gives the 'reload' treatment to a show about flattened meat dishes, including a new chicken piccata and a chicken Kiev that's actually a schnitzel.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Use Your Noodle: The Reload
programme.desc: Reloading an earlier episode, Alton revisits cold-water pasta cooking, and shares his recipe for Cacio a Pepe.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: For Whom The Cheese Melts: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" his classic fondue show with some cheesy science and a completely new recipe, because he really didn't like the first one that much anyway. The Lady of the Refrigerator returns and boy, is she mad!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bermuda
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the landscape and cuisine of the island of Bermuda, a 21-square-mile British territory with Caribbean soul.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Sicily
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern samples Sicily's fried street eats, classic cannoli and unique pizza.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Queens
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits NYC specifically to scope out Queens' multicultural gastronomy. From hand-ripped noodles to spicy Thai stir-fries, grilled Greek octopus to kosher icons like pastrami on rye.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Antonio
programme.desc: Andrew showcases the Tex-Mex favorites of San Antonio, Texas, including puffy tacos and a giant chalupa burger. Other featured foods include slow-cooked brisket, melt-in-your-mouth barbacoa and marinated stuffed quail cooked over mesquite.

programme.title: Heston's Fantastical Food: Heston And The Giant Sweet Shop
programme.desc: In this episode Heston celebrates the biggest excitement of childhood, sweets, by making his own Willy Wonka inspired giant sweet shop.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Dip It Good
programme.desc: Cozy up with a bowl of chips because host Michael McKean has the scoop on our favorite dips. He'll discover that guacamole wouldn't be good without a mailman, queso almost started a civil war and chocolate fountains are full of physics.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Vegas, Baby!
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean has a date with Lady Luck and is ready to go all-in on some tempting Vegas eats. He'll find out how prime rib lured us all to Sin City, and why prohibition poured us all a shrimp cocktail.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: I'm Stuffed
programme.desc: Michael McKean goes on a spectacular journey of some super stuffed foods. Find out if bao are good enough to save our necks, if toasted ravioli are a big stuffed lie and whether knishes could once land you in jail.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Dishes In Disguise
programme.desc: All is not what it seems as Michael McKean reveals the truth behind dishes in disguise. He uncovers what it took to make turducken tick, and how it takes more than magic to get soup inside soup dumplings.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Finger Foods
programme.desc: Put down your fork and get ready to pick up some amazing finger food facts! Michael McKean has things handled, finding out how appetizers found their footing during Prohibition, that a king turned tapas into a tableside treat.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Gadgets And Gizmos
programme.desc: Michael McKean has gadgets and gizmos a'plenty, and he's ready to show them all off! Discover that waffle irons were once incredible artists and the stand mixer almost went overboard, and find out why refrigerators could have been left out in the cold.

programme.title: Good Eats: Frozen Cache
programme.desc: Join host Alton Brown as he elevates the humble home freezer from its usual role as a dumping ground for leftovers and surplus into a powerhouse for proper food preservation.

programme.title: Good Eats: Popover Sometime
programme.desc: Armed with one recipe Alton creates a variety of dishes from a breakfast treat to a dinner classic.

programme.title: Good Eats: Flat Is Beautiful: Going Crackers

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics III: Creole in a Bowl
programme.desc: Alton looks at the cultures that influenced New Orleans beans and rice.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: The Egg Files
programme.desc: Crack the mysterious egg case and pursue a higher understanding of this amazing ovoid.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Choux Shine: The Reload

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Son's Enormous Head

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Two Finger Rule

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross' Tan
